name: Jay Inslee
subject: You beat this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We'll prove to Trump that we take care of each other. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA2OTEzMDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMTk3MjQ1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, Once again, President Trump failed. Today, he failed to pass Trumpcare. And I'm grateful that 700,000 Washingtonians won't have health care ripped away from them. Despite Trump's big words and angry threats, despite Paul Ryan's desperate attempts to save a health care bill that would mean huge tax cuts for the richest Americans, you beat Trumpcare. You stood up against cuts to maternity care and mental health care. You stood up against cuts to Medicare and health care for many millions of Americans. You stood up and America won. We now all know about the president's backwards priorities -- he'll always stand for his billionaire-class friends and not for you. But you know what? Washingtonians just proved that we show up for each other time and time again -- regardless of what the current administration values. Today is a good day for our state, but the fight to resist this administration is far from over. Health care is sure to be on the chopping block again and President Trump's budget proposal threatens everything from Big Bird to Meals on Wheels. And he's already talking about massive tax cuts for the richest Americans while leaving the rest of us in the dust. It's clear Trump cares more about his rich friends' extreme agenda than the wellbeing of the American people he promised to serve. We deserve better. [******So, I 'm asking you to sign on today and pledge that you'll keep up the fight against Trump and his reckless agenda.******](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA2OTEzMDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMTk3MjQ1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0) Let's show President Trump we aren't backing down! Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**SIGN ON »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTA2OTEzMDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMTk3MjQ1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=10691304&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTEyMTk3MjQ1MwS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.
---

PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: [Trumpcare] Not extreme enough for GOP
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dfb/24c69fd9/f27a6e1e/18e3c597/3895994372/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all&source=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all")
---

Peter,

President Trump and Paul Ryan failed.

Their health care bill -- the one that Paul Ryan has been talking about since 2010 -- was _**so**_ extreme that they couldn't even get it through the House where they hold a majority.

But we can't celebrate this victory too long. Trump and Ryan will try to pass the bill again, with just a few minor adjustments that they think will get more Republicans on board.

**[Make sure we're ready when they come back with Trumpcare 2.0. Donate $3 now.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dfb/24c69fd9/f27a6e1e/18e3c590/3895994372/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170324_email_Trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Make+sure+were+ready+when+they+come+back&utm_campaign=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all&source=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all")**

From the get-go, EMILY's List women have been fighting this extreme legislation, which included defunding Planned Parenthood and taking away health insurance from 24 million Americans.

Democratic Leader Nancy Pelosi spread the word that Trumpcare would destroy nearly two million jobs. Rep. Maxine Waters called the bill "merciless" and promised to fight it with every ounce of her strength. And when Republican Pat Roberts made a snarky comment to a reporter about coverage for women's health care, Rep. Jackie Speier called him out.

Our women are in this fight to win it, and we have to be too.

**Donate $3 now to help send more champions like Nancy, Maxine, and Jackie to Congress to fight against Trump's agenda and protect women and families:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Trumpcare-Fail](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dfb/24c69fd9/f27a6e1e/18e3c591/3895994372/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170324_email_Trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgTrumpcareFail&utm_campaign=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all&source=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all")**

Thanks,

Jess O'Connell,
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dfb/24c69fd9/f27a6e1e/18e3c592/3895994372/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170324_email_Trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all&source=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dfb/24c69fd9/f27a6e1e/18e3c593/3895994372/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all&source=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dfb/24c69fd9/f27a6e1e/18e3c58d/3895994372/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all&source=WQEFE326N_digital_email_20170324_TrumpcareVote_n-all"). name: The White House
subject: President Trump's Weekly Address TODAY
body:
Watch at 11AM ET TODAY. |

**“American footprints on distant worlds are not too big a dream.”
-President Donald J. Trump**
This week, President Trump signed the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) Authorization Act of 2017, the first comprehensive NASA authorization passed by Congress in more than six years. The bill demonstrates strong bipartisan support for our Nation’s space program and helps ensure that NASA remains at the forefront of exploration and discovery.

The Act, passed unanimously by Congress, authorizes the development and execution of a long-range plan for deep space human exploration; invests in robust science, technology and aeronautics portfolios; and endorses the Agency’s successful efforts to nurture a new commercial market that will boost our economy and create more jobs. Additionally, it guarantees vastly improved health care for the heroes who risk their lives in the exploration of space.

**To hear a special message from President Trump, watch his Weekly Address to the Nation TODAY at 11AM ET.** Tuning in is simple:
* Follow [President Donald J. Trump](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e5ad17e1425640595b3eae5a136a572316ba64b99c4efce93b9785f90f3021934de3499bba0b9b07e880f80ecb56ac3c20f900b136859026) and [the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e5ad17e142564059b3c2eb7ed1e380bc57d3fa2f915586aefb6d4758c5a466c199c5d41ad89392d1900b199329240f71c83d410f751daa96) on Facebook
* Set a reminder on Facebook
* **[Tune in at 11AM ET to watch](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e5ad17e142564059bd00a0e2b3801003fccad7b103eb708fe0f531e955d89407b7ea779def0af64f1414e7069e442bcb2af5c1be48e8f50f)**

Thank you for your continued support.

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e5ad17e142564059f6fe3387dae3180ed049c291850bab61605e2b2adfe3af9a09c157c9c7cfbeef6ed99565c4151c8e0a382b4313c766ce) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e5ad17e142564059fb6699f48bb488b766780d3f86bdb976b1dbe15151c0174fd0c850edc5b57bdb59c50367f7730b9cc27834f78ae4fb17)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4c66bb7a5f5b53f15ad859bc3dcb172f0f235f366f3506d0378ff41d6ee8ee57c6ae9c157574c490840a42ef66ac4700f)

name: Jill Vogel for Virginia
subject: Jill Vogel Wins Big in Fairfax GOP Straw Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
March 25th, 2017

**FAIRFAX, VA - **Today, State Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for lieutenant governor, won the overwhelming support of Fairfax County Republicans in the county committee's straw poll, capturing nearly two-thirds of the vote in a field of three.
Despite two other campaigns competing fiercely for votes, Vogel emerged a clear favorite, with 64.4% of those expressing a preference. Fellow State Senator Bryce Reeves received 19.8%, while Virginia Beach Delegate Glenn Davis garnered support from 15.8%, according to the tally provided by FCRC.
"I would like to thank everyone who came out this morning for being active and involved in our party," said Senator Jill Vogel. "I am honored to have the support of so many Fairfax Republicans. This November, Republicans must carry an inspiring message of opportunity to counties like Fairfax where we face opportunities for improvement anchored upon our ideas for creating jobs and growing our economy."
Fairfax County is Virginia's largest unit by voting population, commanding a vote share nearly twice that of any other in the Commonwealth.Comparatively, Vogel received more votes than any of the other winners in today's straw poll for Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General. This represents a noted improvement over the [57% of the vote she captured in Prince William County's straw poll](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014oQcf34i689Ci_C4cbU3iALU_71Q8udEdsaRqoR5c9xvdH21xaBvEXlAZZjL66Jit_XCU_TXekRbV5B2ggNfUc1r2JW7YprOCovgXCQOODOmdbl5czyvou4wTb6A2UL-BNvMAJGsiZ8SkHkq0K9RbgCipx6z3Kw9N5A8WAHB3uee4Tf9YIUQPqdpt9PYDn-QXIRKwHd3n87Dr2Go2AY6Etfwh2GfPqeryzBElnVuMDmVr4UK2guIlmF85xQpM6AqRuh8U3zvvfIwyK9tkT4WmPH76crNhaMb&c=aevv1G0v7rYa4M0ORGY5yIIlGsMbgkXIVIKkO2C7t6073Rqyzs1TBg==&ch=jUawicgcc_RK6qjWEaKTFJacFfY_srriB88uU9DEroEufI6lWZq8MQ==) nearly three weeks ago.
"Today's resounding victory shows that Republican momentum continues building behind Jill Vogel," noted Vogel's Campaign Manager Pat Trueman. "Virginia Republicans continue to unify behind Jill because they see in her a proven conservative running a positive, ideas-based campaign who will be the strongest running mate for the entire ticket this November."

Full Results are as Follows:**Jill Vogel - 64.4%**
**Bryce Reeves - 19.8%**
**Glenn Davis - 15.8%**###
P. S., Show your support for Jill by [ordering your free Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor bumper stickers on our campaign website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014oQcf34i689Ci_C4cbU3iALU_71Q8udEdsaRqoR5c9xvdH21xaBvEe6uN0AWILpj6f4Z5Evy41x27TktD3Etny3gUMnMVS2eIwAVX30EiUEk8MU3rjH553B39Lvvu0w6r3xPNv34liSn4LIi-_OA6oTNEtWcNihiDk6CG6P_HzNk0_7K2O1-_DVp5pEuSLN_5ttkAL1z6EFK9ur3KFJgCQ==&c=aevv1G0v7rYa4M0ORGY5yIIlGsMbgkXIVIKkO2C7t6073Rqyzs1TBg==&ch=jUawicgcc_RK6qjWEaKTFJacFfY_srriB88uU9DEroEufI6lWZq8MQ==).

---
| |
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186

---

---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014oQcf34i689Ci_C4cbU3iALU_71Q8udEdsaRqoR5c9xvdH21xaBvEfEOVu-OVlB4QY8p7LUtYFnKmq0gmmlR2EKZF1PjA8gVd1SB8hK-CXL0DgFItWGdLuEtu6mQG-Sch7yrhJShrPbOsqbWG9-9iw9YlDpaetVBxE4Z3_zpbVY=&c=aevv1G0v7rYa4M0ORGY5yIIlGsMbgkXIVIKkO2C7t6073Rqyzs1TBg==&ch=jUawicgcc_RK6qjWEaKTFJacFfY_srriB88uU9DEroEufI6lWZq8MQ==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014oQcf34i689Ci_C4cbU3iALU_71Q8udEdsaRqoR5c9xvdH21xaBvEfEOVu-OVlB4cPPzmrHFAVCKqBeFdjdSTvPoIYK1tSmlvRoZyTKcnq0xZbAoBOdFn-zbnuw5bGq474Rjcil4v9ReXycARfK-7JE_kkWBLc88&c=aevv1G0v7rYa4M0ORGY5yIIlGsMbgkXIVIKkO2C7t6073Rqyzs1TBg==&ch=jUawicgcc_RK6qjWEaKTFJacFfY_srriB88uU9DEroEufI6lWZq8MQ==)

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: yesterday's victory
body:
We'll send you a free sticker
---
**Thanks to your hard work, House Republicans have delayed their vote to repeal Obamacare. Pitch in $3 to help Democrats keep fighting, and we'll send you a new sticker so you can show the GOP you won't back down.

** **[GET YOUR FREE STICKER](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbd4/4067b0a/2e5db9f1f/7e715282/2111902700/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Hands-Off-Obamacare-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+GET+YOUR+FREE+STICKER&utm_campaign=em_20170325_tp_nd&source=em_20170325_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170325_tp_nd")**
Friend --

Yesterday, after failing to get enough Republicans to support his catastrophic health care bill, Donald Trump held a press conference to blame the defeat of Trumpcare on... Democrats.

According to Donald, the reason his health care bill failed in the House is that no Democrats would vote for it.

You're damn right we wouldn't.

Paul Ryan and the House GOP were desperate to jam through a health care bill that would cause 24 million Americans to lose their health insurance. Democrats stood firm and made clear that we wouldn't let that happen. And Donald Trump, master deal-maker that he supposedly is, couldn't get the members of his own party to vote for it.

If passing Trumpcare was a task on _The Apprentice_ , I'm pretty sure Donald would be fired.

We've seen what happens when Donald Trump loses -- he starts looking for new ways to rehash old battles. And after seven years and more than 60 votes to repeal or undermine the Affordable Care Act, you can bet that Paul Ryan and Mitch McConnell aren't giving up for good.

Yesterday, we sent Republicans a message to keep their hands off of Obamacare. Let's make sure they don't forget it.

Pitch in $3 or whatever you can, and we'll send you a free "Hands Off Obamacare" sticker so you can show Republicans you'll keep fighting for affordable health care for all.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbd4/4067b0a/2e5db9f1f/7e715283/2111902700/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hands-off-obamacare?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170325_tp_nd&source=em_20170325_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170325_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbd4/4067b0a/2e5db9f1f/7e715280/2111902700/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hands-off-obamacare?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170325_tp_nd&source=em_20170325_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170325_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbd4/4067b0a/2e5db9f1f/7e715281/2111902700/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hands-off-obamacare?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170325_tp_nd&source=em_20170325_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170325_tp_nd")

Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbd4/4067b0a/2e5db9f1f/7e715294/2111902700/VEsHAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170325_tp_nd&source=em_20170325_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170325_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbd4/4067b0a/2e5db9f1f/7e715295/2111902700/VEsHAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170325_tp_nd&source=em_20170325_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170325_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbd4/4067b0a/2e5db9f1f/7e715292/2111902700/VEsHAg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170325_tp_nd&source=em_20170325_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170325_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbd4/4067b0a/2e5db9f1f/7e715293/2111902700/VEsHDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170325_tp_nd&source=em_20170325_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170325_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: We'll send you a free sticker Thanks to your hard work, House Republicans have delayed their vote to repeal Obamacare. Pitch in $3 to help Democrats keep fighting, and we'll send you a new sticker so you can show the GOP you won't back down. "" Friend -- Yesterday, after failing to get enough Republicans to support his catastrophic health care bill, Donald Trump held a press conference to blame the defeat of Trumpcare on... Democrats. According to Donald, the reason his health care bill failed in the House is that no Democrats would vote for it. You're damn right we wouldn't. Paul Ryan and the House GOP were desperate to jam through a health care bill that would cause 24 million Americans to lose their health insurance. Democrats stood firm and made clear that we wouldn't let that happen. And Donald Trump, master deal-maker that he supposedly is, couldn't get the members of his own party to vote for it. If passing Trumpcare was a task on The Apprentice , I'm pretty sure Donald would be fired. We've seen what happens when Donald Trump loses -- he starts looking for new ways to rehash old battles. And after seven years and more than 60 votes to repeal or undermine the Affordable Care Act, you can bet that Paul Ryan and Mitch McConnell aren't giving up for good. Yesterday, we sent Republicans a message to keep their hands off of Obamacare. Let's make sure they don't forget it. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can, and we'll send you a free "Hands Off Obamacare" sticker so you can show Republicans you'll keep fighting for affordable health care for all. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: LegitAction Team
subject: If you understand this, we want you
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Cole Leystra, Middleton, WI, Treasurer
body:
These things are eroding the legitimacy of our government at an alarming pace. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46dc/1c469400/2f3ba08/3547924/1571984984/VEsH/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/home?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170325_r4w_optin2&source=20170325_r4w_optin2") Friend, We formed LegitAction because we have hope for our democracy and our country, and we are determined to make it a reality. What is really happening in this country isn't about one man in the White House, no matter how overwhelming the daily onslaught of news stories may be. It's about a decades-long assault on the pillars of our government's legitimacy. And we can work to stop it. [_**If you understand what 's really happening in this country, if you're not giving in to feeling overwhelmed -- join us. Become a part of LegitAction today.**_](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46dc/1c469400/2f3ba08/3547925/1571984984/VEsE/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/home?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+If+you+understand+whatrsquos+really+happ&utm_campaign=20170325_r4w_optin2&source=20170325_r4w_optin2") Pouring dark money into our elections, and implementing voter ID laws reminiscent of the Jim Crow era, deny everyone the ability to participate fully and meaningfully in our democracy. Awarding the presidency to candidates who don't win the popular vote, and denying Supreme Court nominations to duly elected presidents, mean the voices of those who do participate don't matter like they should. Together, these things are eroding the legitimacy of our government at an alarming pace. And all of these problems are the result of concentrated, purposeful, decades-long efforts. They didn't start with Trump, and they won't stop with him. That's why supporters throughout the country are stepping up to form an organization dedicated solely to restoring legitimacy. [_**Become a part of LegitAction today and join the nationwide effort to restore our government 's legitimacy.**_](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46dc/1c469400/2f3ba08/3547922/1571984984/VEsF/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/home?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Become+a+part+of+LegitAction+today+and+j&utm_campaign=20170325_r4w_optin2&source=20170325_r4w_optin2") The problem of restoring our government's legitimacy may seem big, but we can manage it when we tackle it bill by bill, state by state -- and when we work together. We need you to work with us. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy, LegitAction Team | [TAKE ACTION »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46dc/1c469400/2f3ba08/3547923/1571984984/VEsC/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/home?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+TAKE+ACTIONnbspraquo&utm_campaign=20170325_r4w_optin2&source=20170325_r4w_optin2")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46dc/1c469400/2f3ba08/3547920/1571984984/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20170325_r4w_optin2&source=20170325_r4w_optin2"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46dc/1c469400/2f3ba08/3547921/1571984984/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20170325_r4w_optin2&source=20170325_r4w_optin2"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46dc/1c469400/2f3ba08/354795e/1571984984/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=7+-+Click+here+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20170325_r4w_optin2&source=20170325_r4w_optin2"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Cole Leystra, Middleton, WI, Treasurer

What is really happening in this country isn't about one man in the White House, no matter how overwhelming the daily onslaught of news stories may be. It's about a decades-long assault on the pillars of our government's legitimacy. And we can work to stop it. "" Pouring dark money into our elections, and implementing voter ID laws reminiscent of the Jim Crow era, deny everyone the ability to participate fully and meaningfully in our democracy. Awarding the presidency to candidates who don't win the popular vote, and denying Supreme Court nominations to duly elected presidents, mean the voices of those who do participate don't matter like they should. Together, these things are eroding the legitimacy of our government at an alarming pace. And all of these problems are the result of concentrated, purposeful, decades-long efforts. They didn't start with Trump, and they won't stop with him. That's why supporters throughout the country are stepping up to form an organization dedicated solely to restoring legitimacy. "" The problem of restoring our government's legitimacy may seem big, but we can manage it when we tackle it bill by bill, state by state -- and when we work together. We need you to work with us. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy, LegitAction Team | ""

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Are you ready, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana Donnelly for Indiana
body:
| | | | |
---
Friend,

Hoosiers want a senator who works as hard as they do. I've been proud to be that senator, give a voice to working families, and get things done for Indiana. When Hoosiers elected me over Richard Mourdock in 2012, it was because they knew I would fight to defend Social Security, protect American jobs, and expand health care options for our veterans.

**And that 's exactly why big special interests are so keen on taking me out in 2018. They're ready to blow the $21 million they spent against me in 2012 out of the water.** **[Chip in now to show special interests they won't be able to buy an Indiana Senate seat in 2018 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4612292629892237312/-2391409629438343168?refcode=20170325&amount=25)**

The Koch brothers and their special interest allies are already crafting a plan to replace me with someone who does their bidding without question. I don't know who my opponent will be, but I do know they'll have a web of Super PAC allies and mountains of dark money behind them.

And that's why **if we want to keep Indiana 's Senate seat in Democratic hands, we need to start building a foundation early -- _now_.**

**[Friend, will you pitch in to help show that we're ready for 2018?](https://act.myngp.com/el/4612292629892237312/-2391409629438343168?refcode=20170325&amount=25)**

Everyone will be looking at our fundraising numbers in 2017 to gauge our grassroots power. The question they'll all be asking is: Does our team have the strength and depth to fight hard and win in 2018?

Allies will be looking to see if our campaign is worth investing in. And opponents will be looking to exploit a weak fundraising number. _If we fall behind now, we may never have the chance to catch up._

Republicans have called this seat a top target for 2018. They think for the right price, it can be theirs. You know what I think? **I think Hoosiers -- and all Americans -- want a senator who stands up to those who would exploit us, not a senator who gives in to them.**

**2018 starts right now.** **[Please pitch in to help us gear up for the big fight that's coming.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4612292629892237312/-2391409629438343168?refcode=20170325&amount=25)**

Thank you,
Joe
| [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4612292629892237312/-2391409629438343168?refcode=20170325&amount=25)
---
Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana Donnelly for Indiana
PO BOX 891
Indianapolis IN 46204 United States [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4612292629892237312/-2463467223476271104)
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: You saved the Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Yesterday, at the eleventh hour, House Speaker Paul Ryan and President Trump pulled the House vote on the GOP's plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act.
Thanks to your hard work -- your calls, your petitions, and your donations -- 24 million hard-working Americans will be able to keep their health coverage.
Under Trumpcare, older Americans would have had to pay an age tax, those struggling with addiction would have lost a vital lifeline for seeking treatment, and women would not have had the guarantee that their insurance would cover maternity and newborn care.
You and I both know that this isn't the last we'll see of Washington Republicans' attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Now is the time to double down on our efforts to improve the ACA.
**[That's why I'm asking you to please donate $3 or more so that we can continue to fight to improve our health care system, not rip health care away from hard-working families.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd6d/2a380d31/15cf53d9/fee4f9/2325590236/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDMyNV9oZWFsdGhjYXJlX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170325_healthcare_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Thank you for everything you did and are doing for progress.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd6d/2a380d31/15cf53d9/fee4f9/2325590236/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDMyNV9oZWFsdGhjYXJlX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170325_healthcare_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd6d/2a380d31/15cf53d9/fee4fa/2325590236/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Democrats.org
subject: Free Obamacare sticker for you →
body:
Get your free sticker before they're all gone. **Thanks to your hard work, House Republicans have delayed their vote to repeal Obamacare. Pitch in $3 to help Democrats keep fighting, and we'll send you a new sticker so you can show the GOP you won't back down.

** **[GET YOUR FREE STICKER](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe8/4067b0a/2e59951f7/7e715c8b/916709106/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Hands-Off-Obamacare-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+GET+YOUR+FREE+STICKER&utm_campaign=em_20170325_dnc_nd&source=em_20170325_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170325_dnc_nd")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe8/4067b0a/2e59951f7/7e715ca3/916709106/VEsEAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170325_dnc_nd&source=em_20170325_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170325_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe8/4067b0a/2e59951f7/7e715ca0/916709106/VEsEAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170325_dnc_nd&source=em_20170325_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170325_dnc_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe8/4067b0a/2e59951f7/7e715cae/916709106/VEsEDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170325_dnc_nd&source=em_20170325_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170325_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

clean_body: Get your free sticker before they're all gone. Thanks to your hard work, House Republicans have delayed their vote to repeal Obamacare. Pitch in $3 to help Democrats keep fighting, and we'll send you a new sticker so you can show the GOP you won't back down. "" "" "" "" "" "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
